Container.Name: alldebrid-client
Container.Overview:
[b]AllDebrid-Client v0.1.0[/b] Branded release with Docker build workflow and release tracking.
Automated torrent/magnet downloading via AllDebrid with a clean Web UI.
[b]Features:[/b] • Watch folder — drop .torrent or .magnet files for auto-import • AllDebrid API — upload, poll status, unlock links, auto-delete after download • aria2 / AriaNg integration via JSON-RPC • JDownloader integration via local API • File filters — block images, keywords, minimum size • Discord webhook notifications • SQLite database — prevents re-downloading known hashes • Import existing magnets already on AllDebrid
[b]Quick Setup:[/b] 1. Set paths for Config, Watch, Processed, Downloads 2. Open http://[IP]:8080 → Settings → enter AllDebrid API key → Save 3. Add magnets via UI or drop files in Watch folder

Config.Name: Config & Database
Config.Description: Stores config.json and the SQLite database. Required for persistence.

Config.Name: Watch Folder
Config.Description: Drop .torrent or .magnet files here for automatic import.

Config.Name: Processed Folder
Config.Description: Torrent/magnet files are moved here after processing.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone. Examples: Europe/Berlin, UTC, America/New_York

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Internal config path — do not change unless you know what you're doing.
